summary: Completed comprehensive testing of crypto AI trading bot dashboard with NEW FEATURES: multi-pair support (8 pairs), trade execution panel, alert system, and notification system. Backend APIs 96.8% successful (30/31), frontend 95% functional with minor overlay issue.

minor_issues.issue: DELETE request works correctly but test code had variable scope issue
minor_issues.impact: Test framework issue only - actual endpoint works fine

ui_bugs.issue: Made with Emergent badge blocks some UI interactions

integration_issues.issue: Trade result notification may need longer wait time to appear

passed_tests: GET /api/pairs returns list of 8 supported trading pairs
GET /api/market/prices returns prices for all pairs
GET /api/market/price?symbol=ETH/USDT returns ETH price
GET /api/market/price?symbol=SOL/USDT returns SOL price
GET /api/market/indicators?symbol=ETH/USDT returns indicators for ETH
POST /api/trades/execute with BUY MARKET order returns trade with SIMULATED status
POST /api/trades/execute with stop_loss and take_profit params records them in trade
GET /api/trades/history returns trade records
POST /api/trades/close/{trade_id} closes trade with PnL calculation
GET /api/risk/settings returns default risk settings
POST /api/risk/settings saves custom risk settings
POST /api/alerts/create creates a price_above alert
POST /api/alerts/create creates a signal_strong_buy alert
GET /api/alerts returns list of alerts
GET /api/notifications returns notifications list
GET /api/notifications/unread returns unread count
POST /api/notifications/read marks all as read
Frontend multi-pair ticker displays all 8 pairs with prices
Frontend TRADE button opens trade panel with BUY/SELL, amount, SL/TP inputs
Frontend ALERTS button opens alert configuration panel
Frontend pair selection changes the active trading pair and refreshes data
Frontend trade execution works and shows SIMULATED result
All original 13 backend endpoints from iteration 1 still working
Live market data integration working for all 8 pairs
AI analysis with GPT-5.2 working
Risk management system functional
Alert system creates and manages price/signal alerts
Notification system tracks and displays alerts
Multi-pair dashboard updates correctly when switching pairs

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major functionality working, minor overlay issue)
